title_en: Homemade Ranch vs. Bottled Ranch: What's in Your Dressing?
title_es: Aderezo Ranch Casero vs. Embotellado: ¿Qué Hay en Tu Salsa?
hook_en: She dips a carrot stick into a jar labeled 'Homemade Ranch' and another into 'Bottled Ranch'.
hook_es: Ella sumerge una zanahoria en un frasco etiquetado 'Ranch Casero' y otra en 'Ranch Embotellado'.
key_message: Homemade ranch is healthier and free of industrial additives like calcium disodium EDTA.
visual_elements: Ingredients list for homemade ranch on screen
Ingredients list for bottled ranch on screen
Zoom on calcium disodium EDTA in bottled ranch
_source_food_context: • HEALTHY: Homemade ranch (greek yogurt, herbs, garlic) vs. PROCESSED: Bottled ranch dressing (soybean oil, MSG, sodium benzoate, calcium disodium EDTA) — Commercial ranch contains calcium disodium EDTA — an industrial chelating agent

title_en: Greek Yogurt Ranch vs. Store-Bought: Taste Test!
title_es: Aderezo de Yogur Griego vs. Comprado en Tienda: ¡Prueba de Sabor!
hook_en: She takes a bite of a salad with homemade ranch, then a bite with store-bought.
hook_es: Ella toma un bocado de ensalada con aderezo casero, luego uno con aderezo de tienda.
key_message: Discover how homemade ranch with greek yogurt is a healthier, tastier option than store-bought.
visual_elements: Side-by-side salad plates, one with homemade dressing, one with store-bought
Her reaction to taste of each
_source_food_context: • HEALTHY: Homemade ranch (greek yogurt, herbs, garlic) vs. PROCESSED: Bottled ranch dressing (soybean oil, MSG, sodium benzoate, calcium disodium EDTA) — Commercial ranch contains calcium disodium EDTA — an industrial chelating agent
